objective: Track deep-research gaps needed before the MLX porting skill can credibly claim comprehensive coverage.

items.summary: Golden scenarios currently cover only dense decoder, MoE decoder, and neural audio codec despite 14 declared architecture families.
items.required_gate: Each declared family routes correctly, proves source weight keys, catches a seeded parity bug, and includes or excludes one family-specific optimization.

items.summary: Static intake should expand to source formats such as ONNX, JAX/Flax, TensorFlow/Keras, GGUF, Core ML, and checkpoint-only repos.
items.required_gate: Static manifest extraction without import or execution, framework layout conventions, unsupported-op report, deterministic weight-map coverage, and no silent fallback to manual routing.

items.summary: Non-generative computer vision ports need first-class guidance for CNNs, ConvNeXt/EfficientNet, detection, segmentation, OCR/layout, SAM-like masks, depth, and pose.
items.required_gate: Preprocessing parity, NCHW/NHWC conversion, logits/masks/boxes parity, IoU/mAP/top-k gates, and NMS/ROIAlign/grid-sample fallback tests.

items.summary: Structured, tabular, time-series, recommender, and ranking models are not first-class porting families.
items.required_gate: Scaler/normalizer parity, categorical vocab and missing-value policy, ragged/sequence batching, temporal leakage checks, NDCG/AUC/forecast-error task gates.

items.summary: GNN, point-cloud, protein, equivariant, simulator, and chemistry ports are absent from the current first-class coverage map.
items.required_gate: Scatter/segment/reduce parity, permutation invariance or equivariance tests, neighbor-list/radius graph fixtures, ragged batching, and units/symmetry constraints.

items.summary: Training and fine-tuning guidance should become a full port target with adapter, distillation, checkpointing, optimizer-state, resume, and trainable custom-kernel tracks.
items.required_gate: Tiny overfit, loss/gradient parity, optimizer state round-trip, checkpoint resume, deterministic seed, and memory graph-retention check.
